task_completion.description: The diagram includes the required title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text reading exactly 'Planogram: Cereal Bay 1' is visible somewhere on the draw.io canvas.

task_completion.description: The diagram visually represents a 4-shelf gondola fixture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct horizontal levels, lines, or rectangular boxes representing shelves are visible on the canvas, arranged vertically.

task_completion.description: The top shelf products are placed correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text or boxes for 'All Bran' and 'Muesli' are located on the highest (topmost) shelf level in the diagram.

task_completion.description: The eye level products are placed correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text or boxes for 'Corn Flakes' and 'Raisin Bran' are located on the second highest shelf level in the diagram.

task_completion.description: The touch level products are placed correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text or boxes for 'Froot Loops' and 'Apple Jacks' are located on the third highest shelf level in the diagram.

task_completion.description: The bottom shelf products are placed correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text or boxes for 'Bag O' Puffs' and 'Value Oats' are located on the lowest (bottommost) shelf level in the diagram.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a .png file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window shows the filename 'cereal_planogram.drawio', and file manager or desktop icons show 'cereal_planogram.png' and 'cereal_planogram.drawio' on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application open with the diagram being visually edited on the canvas, not just a text editor modifying XML.

integrity.description: The agent used draw.io's export functionality to create the PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io 'Export as' menu, save dialogs, or print dialogs, rather than terminal commands converting a file.

integrity.description: The agent opened the merchandising_strategy.txt file to read the rules.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of merchandising_strategy.txt is visible in at least one screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct product placement based on the strategy file is: Top shelf (highest): 'All Bran', 'Muesli'. Eye level (second highest): 'Corn Flakes', 'Raisin Bran'. Touch level (third highest): 'Froot Loops', 'Apple Jacks'. Bottom shelf (lowest): 'Bag O' Puffs', 'Value Oats'. The expected output files are cereal_planogram.drawio and cereal_planogram.png located on the Desktop.
